name: rr-menu
summary: Dropdown action menu (WAI-ARIA menu-button pattern) with full keyboard navigation, Escape/outside-click dismissal, and trigger ARIA wiring.

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: The control that opens the menu (e.g. an rr-button).

events.name: rr-menu-select
events.detail: Fired when an item is chosen; detail.value is the item's value.

events.name: rr-menu-toggle
events.detail: Fired when the menu opens or closes; detail.open is the new state.

rules: Never use hex values. Always use var(--color-*) semantic tokens
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Always set label — it names the menu popup for assistive tech
The popup positions with CSS below the trigger (no portal) — keep the menu outside overflow:hidden ancestors

examples.title: Row actions menu
examples.html:
<rr-menu label="Row actions">
  <rr-button slot="trigger" variant="secondary">Actions</rr-button>
  <rr-menu-item value="edit">Edit rule</rr-menu-item>
  <rr-menu-item value="duplicate">Duplicate</rr-menu-item>
  <rr-menu-item value="delete" danger>Delete rule</rr-menu-item>
</rr-menu>

keyboard: Enter, Space, or click on the trigger toggles the menu
ArrowDown on the trigger opens and focuses the first item; ArrowUp opens focusing the last
ArrowDown/ArrowUp move through enabled items and wrap; Home/End jump to the ends
Enter or Space activates the focused item
Escape closes and returns focus to the trigger; Tab closes and moves on
rules: The slotted trigger receives aria-haspopup=menu and live aria-expanded automatically
Disabled items are skipped by keyboard navigation and are inert to clicks
Focus returns to the trigger on Escape and on item selection
